distinctive_elements: Boss victory jingle (credited to Takeaki Kunimoto)
influences: Konami's Knightmare (1986) - game influenced by similar scrolling shooter design

composer_notes: Kunimoto credited online but stated he only composed the boss victory jingle. Daisuke Inoue likely responsible for bulk of tracks. Sound programmer Keita Hoshi suggested Toshiaki Takimoto or Fumihiko Itagaki may have worked on audio.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Adventures of Dino Riki
